message.content:
@startuml
actor User as U1
participant SearchWindowUI as SWUI
participant SearchOnAnotherInstanceController as SOAIC
participant NetworkFactory as NF
participant UDP_ClientImpl as UDP_CImpl
participant Thread as Thread
participant TCP_ClientImpl as TCP_CImpl
participant SpreadCheet as SC
participant UDP_ClientImpl_03 as UDP_CImpl_03
participant TCP_ClientImpl_03 as TCP_CImpl_03
participant SearchWindowController as SWC

U1 --> SWUI : start searching instances
SWUI --> SOAIC : create(address)
SOAIC --> NF : Obj = getUDPClientImpl(availableInstances)
NF --> UDP_CImpl_03 : create()
UDP_CImpl --> Thread : create(obj)
Thread --> UDP_CImpl_03 : start()
Thread --> Thread : join()
SOAIC --> NF : checkIfIsAvailable()
NF --> UDP_CImpl_03 : getInfo(destination)
SOAIC --> Thread : create(Object)
SOAIC --> Thread : start()
SOAIC --> Thread : getInfo()
Thread --> UDP_CImpl_03 : getInfo()
UDP_CImpl_03 --> SC : getInfo()
Thread --> Thread : join()

@enduml
